<remark> runtime error: Query run out of memory in "recurse" at line 1. It would need at least 2048 MB of RAM to continue. </remark>
</osm>

Runtime error: Query timed out in "query" at line 1 after 25 seconds.

429 Too Many Requests

Your IP is blocked. Please wait before retrying.

The API is currently overloaded. There are already too many parallel requests
being processed. Please try again in a few seconds or minutes.

Synthetic fixture — Overpass did not naturally 429 us during Task 1 fixture
generation. Format follows RESEARCH.md §2 and the public Overpass documentation
at https://dev.overpass-api.de/overpass-doc/en/preface/rate_limiting.html
